name: Creamy Chickpea Curry

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

ingredients.item: Rice and chopped fresh coriander to serve

method: Heat and oil the pan, add the onions, garlic, ginger, and fry for 4 to 5
Then add the chopped tomatoes, chickpeas, and coconut milk. Stir well and
bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Serve with rice and chopped coriander.
